falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in key support levels, contradicting the historical bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: 14-day average trading volume on the Nasdaq drops below 50% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Insufficient volume would refute the blowoff score of 40, suggesting lack of momentum for a market reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The unemployment rate rises above 6.5% in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This macroeconomic deterioration would contradict the historical bottom_2024_aug pattern, falsifying the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
